title: hap-cli-app-editor edit-spec envelope
description: Top-level edit-spec shape. Deep per-op validation is dispatched to the matching module schema by the op.type prefix (e.g. 'field.add' -> field.schema.json). Keep this file to the envelope + the shared op fields only; never inline element-specific op schemas here (decision #9 — schemas are split per module).

app.description: Target application: its real app id (preferred) or its name. The editor resolves it against the live org.

org.description: Organization (network) id. Optional — defaults to the session's current org.

type.description: Operation kind: '<element>.<verb>'. The prefix selects the module schema used for deep validation.

confirm.description: Must be true for destructive ops (delete / overwrite); otherwise apply refuses to run them.

label.description: Optional human label shown in plan/apply output.
